Entries.Name: Easy Context Menu
Entries.Description: Easy Context Menu (ECM) lets you add a variety of useful commands and tweaks to the Desktop, My Computer, Drives, File and Folder right-click context menus. This enables you to access the most used Windows components quickly and easily. Simply check the box next to the items you wish to add. Once added, just right click and the select the component shortcut to launch it. Easy Context Menu is both portable and freeware.
Entries.WhyThisMatters: Easy Context Menu (ECM) lets you add a variety of useful commands and tweaks to the Desktop, My Computer, Drives, File and Folder right-click context menus. This enables you to access the most used Windows components quickly and easily. Simply check the box next to the items you wish to add. Once added, just right click and the select the component shortcut to launch it. Easy Context Menu is both portable and freeware.

Entries.Name: NVCleanstall
Entries.Description: NVCleanstall is a tool designed to customize NVIDIA driver installations, allowing advanced users to control more aspects of the installation process.
Entries.WhyThisMatters: NVCleanstall is a tool designed to customize NVIDIA driver installations, allowing advanced users to control more aspects of the installation process.

Entries.Name: Ollama
Entries.Description: Ollama lets you run and manage local large language models on your desktop.
Entries.WhyThisMatters: Ollama lets you run and manage local large language models on your desktop.

Entries.Name: OPAutoClicker
Entries.Description: A full-fledged autoclicker with two modes of autoclicking, at your dynamic cursor location or at a prespecified location.
Entries.WhyThisMatters: A full-fledged autoclicker with two modes of autoclicking, at your dynamic cursor location or at a prespecified location.

Entries.Name: OpenHashTab
Entries.Description: OpenHashTab is a shell extension for conveniently calculating and checking file hashes from file properties.
Entries.WhyThisMatters: OpenHashTab is a shell extension for conveniently calculating and checking file hashes from file properties.

Entries.Name: OpenVPN Connect
Entries.Description: OpenVPN Connect is an open-source VPN client that allows you to connect securely to a VPN server. It provides a secure and encrypted connection for protecting your online privacy.
Entries.WhyThisMatters: OpenVPN Connect is an open-source VPN client that allows you to connect securely to a VPN server. It provides a secure and encrypted connection for protecting your online privacy.

Entries.Name: ownCloud Desktop
Entries.Description: ownCloud Desktop is the official desktop client for the ownCloud file synchronization and sharing platform.
Entries.WhyThisMatters: ownCloud Desktop is the official desktop client for the ownCloud file synchronization and sharing platform.

Entries.Name: Power Automate for desktop
Entries.Description: Microsoft's Windows RPA tool for building desktop flows to automate repetitive tasks across apps and services.
Entries.WhyThisMatters: Microsoft's Windows RPA tool for building desktop flows to automate repetitive tasks across apps and services.

Entries.Name: Process Explorer
Entries.Description: Process Explorer is a task manager and system monitor.
Entries.WhyThisMatters: Process Explorer is a task manager and system monitor.

Entries.Name: Raspberry Pi Imager
Entries.Description: Raspberry Pi Imager is a utility for writing operating system images to SD cards for Raspberry Pi devices.
Entries.WhyThisMatters: Raspberry Pi Imager is a utility for writing operating system images to SD cards for Raspberry Pi devices.

Entries.Name: Portmaster
Entries.Description: Portmaster is a free and open-source application that puts you back in charge over all your computers network connections.
Entries.WhyThisMatters: Portmaster is a free and open-source application that puts you back in charge over all your computers network connections.

Entries.Name: Power BI
Entries.Description: Create stunning reports and visualizations with Power BI Desktop. It puts visual analytics at your fingertips with intuitive report authoring. Drag-and-drop to place content exactly where you want it on the flexible and fluid canvas. Quickly discover patterns as you explore a single unified view of linked, interactive visualizations.
Entries.WhyThisMatters: Create stunning reports and visualizations with Power BI Desktop. It puts visual analytics at your fingertips with intuitive report authoring. Drag-and-drop to place content exactly where you want it on the flexible and fluid canvas. Quickly discover patterns as you explore a single unified view of linked, interactive visualizations.

Entries.Name: PowerShell
Entries.Description: PowerShell is a task automation framework and scripting language designed for system administrators, offering powerful command-line capabilities.
Entries.WhyThisMatters: PowerShell is a task automation framework and scripting language designed for system administrators, offering powerful command-line capabilities.

Entries.Name: Process Lasso
Entries.Description: Process Lasso is a system optimization and automation tool that improves system responsiveness and stability by adjusting process priorities and CPU affinities.
Entries.WhyThisMatters: Process Lasso is a system optimization and automation tool that improves system responsiveness and stability by adjusting process priorities and CPU affinities.

Entries.Name: Proton Authenticator
Entries.Description: 2FA app from Proton to securely sync and backup 2FA codes.
Entries.WhyThisMatters: 2FA app from Proton to securely sync and backup 2FA codes.

Entries.Name: Proton Pass
Entries.Description: Proton Pass is a cloud-based password manager with end-to-end encryption and unique email aliases.
Entries.WhyThisMatters: Proton Pass is a cloud-based password manager with end-to-end encryption and unique email aliases.

Entries.Name: Proton VPN
Entries.Description: Proton VPN is a no-logs VPN service that protects your privacy online with features like Secure Core and Tor over VPN.
Entries.WhyThisMatters: Proton VPN is a no-logs VPN service that protects your privacy online with features like Secure Core and Tor over VPN.

Entries.Name: SysInternals Process Monitor
Entries.Description: SysInternals Process Monitor is an advanced monitoring tool that shows real-time file system, registry, and process/thread activity.
Entries.WhyThisMatters: SysInternals Process Monitor is an advanced monitoring tool that shows real-time file system, registry, and process/thread activity.

Entries.Name: OrcaSlicer
Entries.Description: G-code generator for 3D printers (Bambu, Prusa, Voron, VzBot, RatRig, Creality, etc.).
Entries.WhyThisMatters: G-code generator for 3D printers (Bambu, Prusa, Voron, VzBot, RatRig, Creality, etc.).

Entries.Name: PrusaSlicer
Entries.Description: PrusaSlicer is a powerful and easy-to-use slicing software for 3D printing with Prusa 3D printers.
Entries.WhyThisMatters: PrusaSlicer is a powerful and easy-to-use slicing software for 3D printing with Prusa 3D printers.

Entries.Name: qBittorrent
Entries.Description: qBittorrent is a free and open-source BitTorrent client that aims to provide a feature-rich and lightweight alternative to other torrent clients.
Entries.WhyThisMatters: qBittorrent is a free and open-source BitTorrent client that aims to provide a feature-rich and lightweight alternative to other torrent clients.

Entries.Name: Transmission
Entries.Description: Transmission is a cross-platform BitTorrent client that is open-source, easy, powerful, and lean.
Entries.WhyThisMatters: Transmission is a cross-platform BitTorrent client that is open-source, easy, powerful, and lean.

Entries.Name: Tixati
Entries.Description: Tixati is a cross-platform BitTorrent client written in C++ that has been designed to be light on system resources.
Entries.WhyThisMatters: Tixati is a cross-platform BitTorrent client written in C++ that has been designed to be light on system resources.

Entries.Name: Quicklook
Entries.Description: Bring macOS “Quick Look” feature to Windows.
Entries.WhyThisMatters: Bring macOS “Quick Look” feature to Windows.

Entries.Name: Revo Uninstaller
Entries.Description: Revo Uninstaller is an advanced uninstaller tool that helps you remove unwanted software and clean up your system.
Entries.WhyThisMatters: Revo Uninstaller is an advanced uninstaller tool that helps you remove unwanted software and clean up your system.

Entries.Name: Wise Program Uninstaller (WiseCleaner)
Entries.Description: Wise Program Uninstaller is the perfect solution for uninstalling Windows programs, allowing you to uninstall applications quickly and completely using its simple and user-friendly interface.
Entries.WhyThisMatters: Wise Program Uninstaller is the perfect solution for uninstalling Windows programs, allowing you to uninstall applications quickly and completely using its simple and user-friendly interface.

Entries.Name: Ripgrep
Entries.Description: Fast and powerful commandline search tool.
Entries.WhyThisMatters: Fast and powerful commandline search tool.

Entries.Name: SageThumbs
Entries.Description: Provides support for thumbnails in Explorer with more formats.
Entries.WhyThisMatters: Provides support for thumbnails in Explorer with more formats.

Entries.Name: Sandboxie Plus
Entries.Description: Sandboxie Plus is a sandbox-based isolation program that provides enhanced security by running applications in an isolated environment.
Entries.WhyThisMatters: Sandboxie Plus is a sandbox-based isolation program that provides enhanced security by running applications in an isolated environment.

Entries.Name: SignalRGB
Entries.Description: SignalRGB lets you control and sync your favorite RGB devices with one free application.
Entries.WhyThisMatters: SignalRGB lets you control and sync your favorite RGB devices with one free application.

Entries.Name: Simplewall
Entries.Description: Simplewall is a free and open-source firewall application for Windows. It allows users to control and manage the inbound and outbound network traffic of applications.
Entries.WhyThisMatters: Simplewall is a free and open-source firewall application for Windows. It allows users to control and manage the inbound and outbound network traffic of applications.

Entries.Name: Spacedrive File Manager
Entries.Description: Spacedrive is a file manager that offers cloud storage integration and file synchronization across devices.
Entries.WhyThisMatters: Spacedrive is a file manager that offers cloud storage integration and file synchronization across devices.

Entries.Name: SpaceSniffer
Entries.Description: A tool application that lets you understand how folders and files are structured on your disks.
Entries.WhyThisMatters: A tool application that lets you understand how folders and files are structured on your disks.

Entries.Name: SuperF4
Entries.Description: SuperF4 is a utility that allows you to terminate programs instantly by pressing a customizable hotkey.
Entries.WhyThisMatters: SuperF4 is a utility that allows you to terminate programs instantly by pressing a customizable hotkey.

Entries.Name: SyncTrayzor
Entries.Description: Windows tray utility / filesystem watcher / launcher for Syncthing.
Entries.WhyThisMatters: Windows tray utility / filesystem watcher / launcher for Syncthing.

Entries.Name: Microsoft SQL Server Management Studio
Entries.Description: SQL Server Management Studio (SSMS) is an integrated environment for managing any SQL infrastructure, from SQL Server to Azure SQL Database. SSMS provides tools to configure, monitor, and administer instances of SQL Server and databases.
Entries.WhyThisMatters: SQL Server Management Studio (SSMS) is an integrated environment for managing any SQL infrastructure, from SQL Server to Azure SQL Database. SSMS provides tools to configure, monitor, and administer instances of SQL Server and databases.

Entries.Name: Tabby.sh
Entries.Description: Tabby is a highly configurable terminal emulator, SSH and serial client for Windows, macOS and Linux.
Entries.WhyThisMatters: Tabby is a highly configurable terminal emulator, SSH and serial client for Windows, macOS and Linux.

Entries.Name: Tailscale
Entries.Description: Tailscale is a secure and easy-to-use VPN solution for connecting your devices and networks.
Entries.WhyThisMatters: Tailscale is a secure and easy-to-use VPN solution for connecting your devices and networks.

Entries.Name: SysInternals TCPView
Entries.Description: SysInternals TCPView is a network monitoring tool that displays a detailed list of all TCP and UDP endpoints on your system.
Entries.WhyThisMatters: SysInternals TCPView is a network monitoring tool that displays a detailed list of all TCP and UDP endpoints on your system.

Entries.Name: TeamSpeak 3
Entries.Description: TEAMSPEAK. YOUR TEAM. YOUR RULES. Use crystal clear sound to communicate with your team mates cross-platform with military-grade security, lag-free performance & unparalleled reliability and uptime.
Entries.WhyThisMatters: TEAMSPEAK. YOUR TEAM. YOUR RULES. Use crystal clear sound to communicate with your team mates cross-platform with military-grade security, lag-free performance & unparalleled reliability and uptime.

Entries.Name: Windows Terminal
Entries.Description: Windows Terminal is a modern, fast, and efficient terminal application for command-line users, supporting multiple tabs, panes, and more.
Entries.WhyThisMatters: Windows Terminal is a modern, fast, and efficient terminal application for command-line users, supporting multiple tabs, panes, and more.

Entries.Name: Total Commander
Entries.Description: Total Commander is a file manager for Windows that provides a powerful and intuitive interface for file management.
Entries.WhyThisMatters: Total Commander is a file manager for Windows that provides a powerful and intuitive interface for file management.

Entries.Name: TranslucentTB
Entries.Description: TranslucentTB is a tool that allows you to customize the transparency of the Windows Taskbar.
Entries.WhyThisMatters: TranslucentTB is a tool that allows you to customize the transparency of the Windows Taskbar.

Entries.Name: Twinkle Tray
Entries.Description: Twinkle Tray lets you easily manage the brightness levels of multiple monitors.
Entries.WhyThisMatters: Twinkle Tray lets you easily manage the brightness levels of multiple monitors.

Entries.Name: Wazuh
Entries.Description: Wazuh is an open-source security monitoring platform that offers intrusion detection, compliance checks, and log analysis.
Entries.WhyThisMatters: Wazuh is an open-source security monitoring platform that offers intrusion detection, compliance checks, and log analysis.

Entries.Name: Windows PC Health Check
Entries.Description: Windows PC Health Check is a tool that helps you check if your PC meets the system requirements for Windows 11.
Entries.WhyThisMatters: Windows PC Health Check is a tool that helps you check if your PC meets the system requirements for Windows 11.

Entries.Name: WindowGrid
Entries.Description: WindowGrid is a modern window management program for Windows that allows the user to quickly and easily layout their windows on a dynamic grid using just the mouse.
Entries.WhyThisMatters: WindowGrid is a modern window management program for Windows that allows the user to quickly and easily layout their windows on a dynamic grid using just the mouse.

Entries.Name: WinPaletter
Entries.Description: WinPaletter is a tool for adjusting the color palette of Windows 10, providing customization options for window colors.
Entries.WhyThisMatters: WinPaletter is a tool for adjusting the color palette of Windows 10, providing customization options for window colors.

Entries.Name: WireGuard
Entries.Description: WireGuard is a fast and modern VPN (Virtual Private Network) protocol. It aims to be simpler and more efficient than other VPN protocols, providing secure and reliable connections.
Entries.WhyThisMatters: WireGuard is a fast and modern VPN (Virtual Private Network) protocol. It aims to be simpler and more efficient than other VPN protocols, providing secure and reliable connections.

Entries.Name: Wireshark
Entries.Description: Wireshark is a widely-used open-source network protocol analyzer. It allows users to capture and analyze network traffic in real-time, providing detailed insights into network activities.
Entries.WhyThisMatters: Wireshark is a widely-used open-source network protocol analyzer. It allows users to capture and analyze network traffic in real-time, providing detailed insights into network activities.

Entries.Name: WiseToys
Entries.Description: WiseToys is a set of utilities and tools designed to enhance and optimize your Windows experience.
Entries.WhyThisMatters: WiseToys is a set of utilities and tools designed to enhance and optimize your Windows experience.

Entries.Name: WizFile
Entries.Description: Find files by name on your hard drives almost instantly.
Entries.WhyThisMatters: Find files by name on your hard drives almost instantly.

Entries.Name: Xtreme Download Manager
Entries.Description: Xtreme Download Manager is an advanced download manager with support for various protocols and browsers. *Browser integration deprecated by google store. No official release.*
Entries.WhyThisMatters: Xtreme Download Manager is an advanced download manager with support for various protocols and browsers. *Browser integration deprecated by google store. No official release.*

Entries.Name: HxD Hex Editor
Entries.Description: HxD is a free hex editor that allows you to edit, view, search, and analyze binary files.
Entries.WhyThisMatters: HxD is a free hex editor that allows you to edit, view, search, and analyze binary files.

Entries.Name: XPipe
Entries.Description: XPipe is an open-source tool for orchestrating containerized applications. It simplifies the deployment and management of containerized services in a distributed environment.
Entries.WhyThisMatters: XPipe is an open-source tool for orchestrating containerized applications. It simplifies the deployment and management of containerized services in a distributed environment.

Entries.Name: ZeroTier One
Entries.Description: ZeroTier One is a software-defined networking tool that allows you to create secure and scalable networks.
Entries.WhyThisMatters: ZeroTier One is a software-defined networking tool that allows you to create secure and scalable networks.

Entries.Name: ZoomIt
Entries.Description: A screen zoom, annotation, and recording tool for technical presentations and demos.
Entries.WhyThisMatters: A screen zoom, annotation, and recording tool for technical presentations and demos.

Entries.Name: Zoxide
Entries.Description: Zoxide is a fast and efficient directory changer (cd) that helps you navigate your file system with ease.
Entries.WhyThisMatters: Zoxide is a fast and efficient directory changer (cd) that helps you navigate your file system with ease.

Entries.Name: Syncthingtray
Entries.Description: Might be the alternative for Synctrayzor. Windows tray utility / filesystem watcher / launcher for Syncthing.
Entries.WhyThisMatters: Might be the alternative for Synctrayzor. Windows tray utility / filesystem watcher / launcher for Syncthing.

Entries.Name: Intel-PresentMon
Entries.Description: A new gaming performance overlay and telemetry application to monitor and measure your gaming experience.
Entries.WhyThisMatters: A new gaming performance overlay and telemetry application to monitor and measure your gaming experience.

Entries.Name: TightVNC
Entries.Description: TightVNC is a free and open-source remote desktop software that lets you access and control a computer over the network. With its intuitive interface, you can interact with the remote screen as if you were sitting in front of it. You can open files, launch applications, and perform other actions on the remote desktop almost as if you were physically there.
Entries.WhyThisMatters: TightVNC is a free and open-source remote desktop software that lets you access and control a computer over the network. With its intuitive interface, you can interact with the remote screen as if you were sitting in front of it. You can open files, launch applications, and perform other actions on the remote desktop almost as if you were physically there.

Entries.Name: UltraVNC
Entries.Description: UltraVNC is a powerful, easy to use and free - remote pc access software - that can display the screen of another computer (via internet or network) on your own screen. The program allows you to use your mouse and keyboard to control the other PC remotely. It means that you can work on a remote computer, as if you were sitting in front of it, right from your current location.
Entries.WhyThisMatters: UltraVNC is a powerful, easy to use and free - remote pc access software - that can display the screen of another computer (via internet or network) on your own screen. The program allows you to use your mouse and keyboard to control the other PC remotely. It means that you can work on a remote computer, as if you were sitting in front of it, right from your current location.

Entries.Name: VistaSwitcher
Entries.Description: VistaSwitcher makes it easier for you to locate windows and switch focus, even on multi-monitor systems. The switcher window consists of an easy-to-read list of all tasks running with clearly shown titles and a full-sized preview of the selected task.
Entries.WhyThisMatters: VistaSwitcher makes it easier for you to locate windows and switch focus, even on multi-monitor systems. The switcher window consists of an easy-to-read list of all tasks running with clearly shown titles and a full-sized preview of the selected task.

Entries.Name: Windows Auto Dark Mode
Entries.Description: Automatically switches between the dark and light theme of Windows 10 and Windows 11.
Entries.WhyThisMatters: Automatically switches between the dark and light theme of Windows 10 and Windows 11.

Entries.Name: Ambie White Noise
Entries.Description: Ambie is the ultimate app to help you focus, study, or relax. We use white noise and nature sounds combined with an innovative focus timer to keep you concentrated on doing your best work.
Entries.WhyThisMatters: Ambie is the ultimate app to help you focus, study, or relax. We use white noise and nature sounds combined with an innovative focus timer to keep you concentrated on doing your best work.

Entries.Name: Magic Wormhole
Entries.Description: get things from one computer to another, safely.
Entries.WhyThisMatters: get things from one computer to another, safely.

Entries.Name: croc
Entries.Description: Easily and securely send things from one computer to another.
Entries.WhyThisMatters: Easily and securely send things from one computer to another.

Entries.Name: GlazeWM
Entries.Description: GlazeWM is a tiling window manager for Windows inspired by i3 and Polybar.
Entries.WhyThisMatters: GlazeWM is a tiling window manager for Windows inspired by i3 and Polybar.

Entries.Name: FanControl
Entries.Description: Fan Control is a free and open-source software that allows the user to control his CPU, GPU and case fans using temperatures.
Entries.WhyThisMatters: Fan Control is a free and open-source software that allows the user to control his CPU, GPU and case fans using temperatures.

Entries.Name: ForceAutoHDR
Entries.Description: ForceAutoHDR simplifies the process of adding games to the AutoHDR list in the Windows Registry.
Entries.WhyThisMatters: ForceAutoHDR simplifies the process of adding games to the AutoHDR list in the Windows Registry.

Entries.Name: JoyToKey
Entries.Description: Enables PC game controllers to emulate the keyboard and mouse input.
Entries.WhyThisMatters: Enables PC game controllers to emulate the keyboard and mouse input.

Entries.Name: OFGB (Oh Frick Go Back)
Entries.Description: GUI Tool to remove ads from various places around Windows 11
Entries.WhyThisMatters: GUI Tool to remove ads from various places around Windows 11

Entries.Name: Lenovo Legion Toolkit
Entries.Description: Lenovo Legion Toolkit (LLT) is a open-source utility created for Lenovo Legion laptops, that allows changing a couple of features that are only available in Lenovo Vantage or Legion Zone. It runs no background services, uses less memory, uses virtually no CPU, and contains no telemetry. Just like Lenovo Vantage, this application is Windows only.
Entries.WhyThisMatters: Lenovo Legion Toolkit (LLT) is a open-source utility created for Lenovo Legion laptops, that allows changing a couple of features that are only available in Lenovo Vantage or Legion Zone. It runs no background services, uses less memory, uses virtually no CPU, and contains no telemetry. Just like Lenovo Vantage, this application is Windows only.

Entries.Name: PowerShell ISE
Entries.Description: Integrated Scripting Environment for PowerShell with GUI
Entries.WhyThisMatters: Windows PowerShell ISE is an interactive scripting environment for Windows PowerShell with a GUI-based editor

Entries.Name: Office Tool Plus
Entries.Description: Install/configure individual Microsoft Office apps without the full bundle
Entries.WhyThisMatters: Office Tool Plus lets you download, install and configure specific Microsoft Office apps (e.g. Word/Excel) without pulling in the full bundle (OneDrive, Sticky Notes, etc.). Useful for slimming an Office install or scripting deployments.

Entries.Name: Todoist
Entries.Description: Cross-platform task and project manager
Entries.WhyThisMatters: Cross-platform task and project manager with natural-language date parsing and shared projects.

Entries.Name: Morgen
Entries.Description: Calendar and tasks unified in one client
Entries.WhyThisMatters: Brings calendar and tasks into one app with support for multiple calendar accounts (Google/Outlook/iCloud) and task services (Todoist/TickTick/Microsoft To Do).

Entries.Name: AltSnap
Entries.Description: Alt + drag to move/resize windows from anywhere
Entries.WhyThisMatters: Lets you grab any window with Alt + left-click to move it (or Alt + right-click to resize) without targeting the title bar — much faster window management on multi-monitor setups. Active fork of the abandoned AltDrag.

Entries.Name: WinCDEmu
Entries.Description: Mount ISO/CUE/IMG/BIN/NRG/MDS/CCD/IMG files as virtual drives
Entries.WhyThisMatters: Open-source disc-image mounter with shell integration for the formats Windows can't open natively (CUE, NRG, MDS, CCD, IMG, BIN). Lighter than DAEMON Tools.

Entries.Name: Jackett
Entries.Description: Torrent indexer proxy that powers the *arr stack
Entries.WhyThisMatters: Translates queries from Sonarr/Radarr/Lidarr/etc. into per-tracker search APIs so the *arr stack can index dozens of trackers without per-app config.

Entries.Name: Veeam Agent
Entries.Description: Free Windows backup and bare-metal recovery
Entries.WhyThisMatters: Free image-based backup with bare-metal recovery to USB/ISO. Industry-standard restore reliability.

Entries.Name: NVIDIA App
Entries.Description: Modern unified replacement for GeForce Experience and the NVIDIA Control Panel
Entries.WhyThisMatters: Combines driver updates, Control Panel settings, ShadowPlay capture, and game optimization into one app — supersedes both GeForce Experience and the legacy NVIDIA Control Panel.

Entries.Name: Ryzen Master
Entries.Description: AMD CPU tuning, monitoring, and overclocking utility
Entries.CautionReason: Overclocking utility — applying an aggressive profile can lock the system into an unstable boot loop and may void the CPU warranty. Use only on AMD Ryzen platforms; do not enable on laptops or stock-clocked production machines.
Entries.WhyThisMatters: AMD's official CPU tuning + monitoring utility. Required for Curve Optimizer / PBO tweaking, per-core voltage curves, and SoC/IOD voltage adjustments. Read-only monitoring is safe; applying profiles is not.

Entries.Name: SPICE WebDAV daemon
Entries.Description: Folder sharing for QEMU/KVM SPICE guests (guest-side daemon)
Entries.WhyThisMatters: Only useful inside a SPICE VM guest (QEMU/KVM). Surfaces the host's shared folder over WebDAV inside the guest. Skip on bare metal or non-SPICE hypervisors.

Entries.Name: SPICE VD Agent
Entries.Description: Clipboard sync and dynamic display resize for SPICE guests
Entries.WhyThisMatters: Only useful inside a SPICE VM guest (QEMU/KVM). Enables host/guest clipboard sync and dynamic display resize when the guest window is resized. Skip on bare metal or non-SPICE hypervisors.
